children.label: A

children.label: B
children.text: the marketing year of shipment; and

children.heading: Confidentiality and compilation of reports
children.label: 2 Confidentiality and compilation of reports
children.text: Individual reports shall remain confidential but shall be compiled by the Secretary and published in compilation form each week following the week of reporting.

children.heading: Immediate reporting
children.label: 3 Immediate reporting
children.text: All exporters of agricultural commodities produced in the United States shall, upon request of the Secretary, immediately report to the Secretary any information with respect to export sales of agricultural commodities and at such times as the Secretary may request. When the Secretary requires that such information be reported by exporters on a daily basis, the information compiled from individual reports shall be made available to the public daily.

children.label: A
children.text: there is a domestic supply of such commodity substantially in excess of the quantity needed to meet domestic requirements,

children.label: B
children.text: total supplies of such commodity in the exporting countries are estimated to be in surplus,

children.label: C
children.text: anticipated exports will not result in excessive drain on domestic supplies, and

children.label: D
children.text: to require the reports to be made will unduly hamper export sales,

children.heading: Failure to report
children.label: b Failure to report
children.text: Any person who knowingly fails to make any report required under this section shall be fined not more than $25,000 or imprisoned for not more than 1 year, or both.
